person.name: Reynold FitzHerbert
person.userCertifiedLifeSummary:
«b»Biography
Birth«/b»
Reynold FitzHerbert, Knt., was born about 1312 (aged 16 in 1328). He was the son and heir of Herbert FitzReynold and Lucy Peverel, daughter of Andrew Peverel, Knt., and Katherine Ifield. Some sources refer to him as "Reginald", however Richardson calls him Reynold.

«b»Marriage and Children«/b»
Reynold married Joan Hakeluyt (or Hakelute), daughter of Edmund Hakeluyt, of Kongford, Herefordshire. Together they had one son and two daughters:

1.) Edmund Fitz Herbert, Knt.He was born at Dynvor and baptized at Llandyfeisant, Carm. on 26 Jan 1338. Edmund was the heir of his grandmother, Lucy Peverel's brother, Andrew Peverel and his wife Katherine.

2.) Alice Fitz Herbert., married Thomas West, Knt.

3.)Lucy Fitz Herbert (nun at Shaftesbury)

«b»Lands and Military Service«/b»
Reynold held lands at Midsomer Norton, Somerset; Luton, Bedfordshire; Hinton Martell, and Broadmayne, Dorset, and other places.
In 1337, Reynold in the kings service, going "beyond the seas".
In 1344, Reynold and Ralph de Ufford were going to Ireland in the king's service.

«b»Death«/b»
Reynold died on 12 or 13 September 1346.

«b»Calendar of the Close Rolls Vol VIII, Edward III«/b»
On Oct 24, 1346 Thomas Cary was ordered not to intermeddle further with the manor of Hynton Martel and a moiety of the manor of Mapeudre with the advowson of the church of that town, co. Dorset, restoring the issues thereof to Joan, late the wife of Reginald Fitz Reginald at his death held no lands in his demesne as of fee or in service, in chief, in co. Dorset, but that he held the said manor, moiety and advowson jointly with Joan, of others than the king, by divers services.
On 26 Oct 1346 in Windsor, "Thomas Cary, the Escheator in co. Somerset was ordered to deliver to Joan, late wife of Reginald le fitz Herbert, tenant in chief, after taking her oath that she would not marry without the king's licence, a moiety of the manor of Shipton Malet, extended at 19L.,7s.,6d. yearly with the knights fees and advowsons pertaining thereto, which the king has assigned to her to hold in dower of the lands which belonged to her husband."
"Memorandum that Bartholomew Tyrel, clerk, in the name and stead of Richard Talbot, to whom the king granted the custody of the lands which belonged to Reginald, and which were in the king's hand by reason of the minority of Reginald's heir, came into chancery at Westminister on 26 Oct. and undertook at his peril that Robert would hold himself content with the assignment of dower to Joan in the form aforesaid."

His wife Joan survived him and married a second time to Thomas Le Blount, Knt., as his first wife. Together they had three sons and one daughter. Joan was still living in 1363.

zh.lifeSummary: 當Reynold FitzHerbert於大約1312年出生在英國英格蘭時，他的父親Herbert FitzReynold20歲，母親Lucy de Peverel24歲。他於1339年與Joan Hakeluyt在英國薩默塞特結婚。他們至少是1個兒子和2個女兒的父母。他去世於大約1346年9月在他的家鄉享年35歲。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Reynold FitzHerbert于大约1312年出生在英国英格兰时，他的父亲Herbert FitzReynold20岁，母亲Lucy de Peverel24岁。他于1339年与Joan Hakeluyt在英国薩默塞特结婚。他们至少是1个儿子和2个女儿的父母。他去世于大约1346年9月在他的家乡享年35岁。

nameMeanings.name: FitzHerbert
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English and Irish: from Anglo-Norman French fi(t)z ‘son’ (see Fitz ) + the personal name Herbert (see Herbert ), ‘son of Herbert’.

variants.name: Fitz
meanings: English: from Anglo-Norman French fi(t)z ‘son’ (from Latin filius), used originally to distinguish a son from a father bearing the same personal name and then conventionalized as a hereditary surname, or short for a surname of which fiz ‘son’ was the first element, for example Fitzhenry and Fitzroy .
German: from a vernacular pet form of the personal name Vinzenz (see Vincent ) or Vitus (see Vito , compare Veit ). Compare also Fietz .

nameMeanings.name: Reynold
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: From an Old French name, Reinald, Reynaud, of Germanic (Frankish) origin, derived from ragin ‘advice, decision’ + wald ‘ruler’. This was adopted by the Normans and introduced by them into England. In modern use, the given name sometimes represents a transferred use of the surname derived from the Norman personal name.

en.lifeSummary: When Reynold FitzHerbert was born about 1312, in England, United Kingdom, his father, Herbert FitzReynold, was 20 and his mother, Lucy de Peverel, was 24. He married Joan Hakeluyt in 1339, in Somerset, England. They were the parents of at least 1 son and 2 daughters. He died about September 1346, in his hometown, at the age of 35.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Reynold FitzHerbert est né environ 1312, à Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, son père, Herbert FitzReynold, avait 20 ans et sa mère, Lucy de Peverel, avait 24 ans. Il a épousé Joan Hakeluyt en 1339, à Somerset, Angleterre. Ils ont eu au moins 1 fils et 2 filles. Il est décédé environ septembre 1346, dans sa ville natale, à l’âge de 35 ans.

de.lifeSummary: Als Reynold FitzHerbert um 1312 in England, United Kingdom geboren wurde, war sein Vater Herbert FitzReynold 20 und seine Mutter Lucy de Peverel 24. Er hat 1339 in Somerset, England Joan Hakeluyt geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 1 Sohn und 2 Töchter. Er starb um September 1346 im Alter von 35 Jahren in seinem Geburtsort.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Reynold FitzHerbert è nato il circa 1312 nel Inghilterra, Regno Unito, il suo padre, Herbert FitzReynold, aveva 20 anni e il suo madre, Lucy de Peverel, aveva 24 anni. Lui sposato Joan Hakeluyt nel 1339, nel Somerset, England. Erano genitori di almeno 1 figlio e 2 figlie. Morì circa settembre 1346, nel sua cittadina, all'età di 35 anni.

ja.lifeSummary: Reynold FitzHerbertが約1312年にイギリスイギリスで生まれた時，父Herbert FitzReynoldは20歳，母Lucy de Peverelは24歳であった。1339年にイギリスソメルセトでJoan Hakeluytと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも1人の息子と2人の娘の親であった。彼は約1346年9月に故郷で35歳で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Reynold FitzHerbert(이)가 대략 1312년 영국 잉글랜드에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Herbert FitzReynold(은)는 20세였고, 그의 어머니 Lucy de Peverel(은)는 24세였다. 그는 1339년 영국 서머세트에서 Joan Hakeluyt(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 한 명의 아들과 두 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 대략 1346년 9월 그의 고향에서 35세의 나이로 사망했다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Reynold FitzHerbert nasceu aproximadamente 1312, em Inglaterra, United Kingdom, seu pai, Herbert FitzReynold, tinha 20 anos e sua mãe, Lucy de Peverel, tinha 24 anos. Ele casou-se com Joan Hakeluyt em 1339, em Somerset, Inglaterra. Eles tiveram pelo menos 1 filho e 2 filhas. Ele faleceu aproximadamente setembro de 1346, em sua cidade natal, com 35 anos.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Reynold FitzHerbert родился около 1312 г. в местности Англия, Великобритания, его отцу по имени Herbert FitzReynold было 20 лет, а матери, которую звали Lucy de Peverel, 24. Он женился на женщине по имени Joan Hakeluyt в 1339 г. в местности сомирсет, Англия. У них был по крайней мере 1 сын и 2 дочери. Он умер около сентябрь 1346 г. в его родном городе в возрасте 35 лет.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Reynold FitzHerbert nació aproximadamente 1312, en Inglaterra, Reino Unido, su papá, Herbert FitzReynold, tenía 20 años y su mamá, Lucy de Peverel, tenía 24 años. Se casó con Joan Hakeluyt en 1339, en Somerset, Inglaterra. Fueron padres de por lo menos 1 hijo y 2 hijas. Murió aproximadamente septiembre de 1346, en su pueblo, a la edad de 35 años.
